widget.name: AWNIC OTP Input
widget.description: OTP input with SMS and email auto-fill for iOS and Android.

property.caption: OTP value
property.description: String attribute to store the entered OTP.

property.caption: Auto focus
property.description: Focus the input automatically when the widget mounts.

property.caption: Placeholder character
property.description: Single character shown when a box is empty (e.g. '-' or '·').

property.caption: On complete
property.description: Action to run when all digits are entered.

property.caption: On change
property.description: Action to run when any digit changes.

property.caption: Console App Hash
property.description: Log the Android App Hash Signature to the console for testing.

property.caption: Show auto-fill badge
property.description: Show the badge when OTP is auto-filled.

property.caption: Badge text
property.description: Custom text for the auto-fill badge.

property.caption: Show hint
property.description: Show the hint text below the input boxes.

property.caption: Custom hint
property.description: Custom instruction text. If empty, the default will be used.
